versions.version_description: Mostly chords, but does have some melody driven parts such as the intro and the end of the chorus. The song, however, can be played entirely with chords, as notated above the tabbed sections. Chords are listed along with how to play them. If you want to play chords at the beginning of the second verse, just repeat the same chords from the first verse. Additionally, if you have a second guitar, the intro can be played throughout the entire song (except the bridge/outro) while the other guitar is playing the chords. As for the strumming pattern, this song has no guitar and therefore no true strumming pattern. The ones I created are just based on the bass and the hook. So you can use them as a guide if you want, but I honestly would just strum however is easiest and/or sounds best to you.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Chords
----------
[ch]Em[/ch]  02200x
[ch]Am[/ch]  x0221x
[ch]B7[/ch]  x2120x

Capo 3rd fret


[Intro]
[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]B7[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
White shirt now red, my bloody nose, sleepin', you're on your tippy toes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                 [ch]B7[/ch]
Creepin' around like no one knows, think you're so criminal[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Bruises on both my knees for you, don't say thank you or please, I do[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]B7[/ch]
What I want when I'm wanting to, my soul so cynical[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
So you're a tough guy, like it really rough guy[/tab]

Just can't get enough guy, chest always so puffed guy
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm that bad type, make your mama sad type[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]B7[/ch]
Make your girlfriend mad tight, might seduce your dad type[/tab]
N.C.
I'm the bad guy, duh


[Post-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]B7[/ch]
    I'm the bad guy[/tab]


[Verse 2]
N.C.
I like it when you take control, even if you know that you don't
N.C.
Own me, I'll let you play the role, I'll be your animal
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
My mommy likes to sing along with me, but she won't sing this song[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                                  [ch]B7[/ch]
If she reads all the lyrics, she'll pity the men I know[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]
So you're a tough guy, like it really rough guy[/tab]

Just can't get enough guy, chest always so puffed guy
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]
I'm that bad type, make your mama sad type[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]B7[/ch]
Make your girlfriend mad tight, might seduce your dad type[/tab]
N.C.
I'm the bad guy, duh


[Post-Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]B7[/ch]
    I'm the bad guy,  duh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                         [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]B7[/ch]
    I'm only good at bein' bad, bad[/tab]


[Interlude]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
   I like when you get mad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
   I guess I'm pretty glad that you're alone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
   You said she's scared of me, I mean[/tab]
N.C.
I don't see what she sees but maybe it's 'cause I'm wearing your cologne


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
   I'm a bad guy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
   I'm a bad guy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
   Bad guy, bad guy, I'm a bad[/tab]
